generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing angle encoder measuring the crane's swing"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleTopic
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed around the crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedTopic
]

instance MotorControllerStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Low‑level motor controller state sensor reporting encoder and current values"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorControllerStateTopic
]

instance SwingAngleTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance MotorControllerStateTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorControllerStateSensor
]

instance SwingAngleTimeseries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series logs of swing angle measurements stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBInstance
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleTopic
]

instance WindSpeedTimeseries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series logs of wind speed measurements stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBInstance
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedTopic
]

instance MotorControllerStateTimeseries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series logs of motor controller state stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBInstance
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorControllerStateTopic
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor driving the cart on the gantry rail, controlled by a TMC4671 driver"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor driving the hoist winch, controlled by a TMC4671 driver"
]

instance ElectromagnetActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet used to pick up and hold puck‑like containers"
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360CADTool
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Parametric kinematic model used by the trajectory generation service"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance WindSwingDynamicsSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation data for wind and swing dynamics used by the simulation service"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineApp
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module providing high‑level API for crane control"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ControlService
]

instance DockerCompose : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker Compose orchestrator for running TimescaleDB, Mosquitto, Grafana, and twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDBInstance, MosquittoBroker, GrafanaDashboard, TrajectoryGeneratorApp, SimulationEngineApp, ContinuousValidationApp, DashboardApp, ControlApp
]

instance TimescaleDBInstance : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for storing time‑series sensor and actuator logs"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MosquittoBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating inter‑service messaging"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService, SimulationService, TrajectoryGenerationService, ControlService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana instance providing real‑time dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance Fusion360CADTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 component for accessing CAD models"
    DTDFVocab:enables Fusion360CADModel
]

instance KiCadTool : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "KiCad schematic tool used for designing the Arduino shield and motor driver boards"
]

instance MkDocsDocs : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MkDocs documentation generator for twin documentation"
]

instance GitHubActions : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline for building and testing the twin"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorApp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Container running the trajectory generation micro‑service"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SimulationEngineApp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Container running the crane dynamics simulation service"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationApp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Container running the continuous validation micro‑service"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DashboardApp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Container hosting the Grafana dashboard application"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance ControlApp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Container running the control application commanding actuators via Python gantrylib"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that captures continuous sensor and actuator data and writes to TimescaleDB"
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that streams real‑time sensor traces and confidence bounds to Grafana dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that computes optimal, minimal‑swing trajectories using the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that simulates crane dynamics and controller behavior for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceGuidanceInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that compares measured trajectories with simulated predictions and alerts operators"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that translates trajectory plans into stepper motor commands via TMC4671 drivers"
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight notifying operators of deviations between measured and simulated trajectories"
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight recommending minimal‑swing trajectory paths for container transport"
]

instance MaintenanceGuidanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight guiding maintenance and parameter tuning based on simulation results"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight displaying system health and operational efficiency metrics on a dashboard"
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of trajectory parameters to minimize swing"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceGuidanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic scheduling of maintenance tasks based on validation outcomes"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LabScaleGantryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, MotorControllerStateSensor,
    CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, ElectromagnetActuator,
    TimescaleDBInstance, MosquittoBroker, GrafanaDashboard,
    TrajectoryGeneratorApp, SimulationEngineApp, ContinuousValidationApp,
    DashboardApp, ControlApp
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Trajectory Generator outputs optimal motor trajectories, which are sent over MQTT to the Control Application; the Control Application forwards the motor position/speed setpoints to the Physical Crane Interface, which writes the commands to the TMC4671 drivers on the Arduino controlling the stepper motors."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All services operate in real‑time; logging occurs continuously at the rate of sensor polling (typically 10 Hz), continuous validation polls the database each update, and trajectory generation/commanding occurs on demand yet processes data with minimal latency (sub‑100 ms)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An orchestrated architecture where a Python application (gantrylib) controls the physical crane via serial to Arduino and exposes MQTT topics. The twin services consume these topics, generate trajectories, simulate behavior, validate against measurements, and expose results via a Grafana panel, all coordinated through Docker Compose."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The exemplar supports holistic lifecycle coverage: design (CAD and kinematic model), manufacturing (physical crane built from BOM), operation (real‑time control and logging), as well as validation and maintenance stages, where continuous validation and fault classification are applied during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is verified by comparing logged measurements against simulated trajectories; distance metrics are calculated within the Continuous Validation service and compared to an acceptable threshold, triggering operator alerts. Validation methodologies rely on model‑based checks and time‑series classification techniques to detect faults and quantify uncertainty due to sensor noise and actuator dynamics."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical–digital coupling uses a USB serial link from PC to Arduino, which drives the stepper motors via TMC4671 drivers; inter‑service communication is over MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) using standard MQTT v3.1.1; data persistence occurs over PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB via SQL; dashboards connect to TimescaleDB through Grafana’s data source."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a local personal computer; Docker Compose brings up all containers (TimescaleDB, Mosquitto, Grafana, and the custom twin services). The Python modules run within the containers, and the system is version‑controlled via GitHub. The setup is reproducible via a single `docker compose up` command."
]
